name: @geist-nuxt/kit-api-docs
description: API docs kit. Distribution unit is the SLICE: when copying a component into a consuming project, copy every file listed in its `files` array to its `target` (components -> app/components/api-docs/, composables -> app/composables/, presets -> app/utils/). Keeping the api-docs/ directory gives every component the ApiDocs* prefix (pathPrefix:true) and isolates it from the consumer's own components. `coreDeps` are satisfied automatically by extending @geist-nuxt/core. Dependency rules: (1) a slice may compose sibling slices — declare them in `registryDependencies` so copying pulls them in too (e.g. field-item -> enum-table, lifecycle-badge); (2) each slice owns its files, so any shared logic module lives inside exactly one slice's `files` (e.g. lifecycle-preset ships with lifecycle-badge) and is reached transitively via that dependency — it is NOT duplicated across slices; (3) logic shared kit-wide with no natural owning slice moves up to core (reached via coreDeps). No standalone, slice-less shared files.

items.name: code-block
items.title: ApiDocsCodeBlock
items.description: Syntax-highlighted code block with copy button and soft-wrap toggle.

items.name: request-example
items.title: ApiDocsRequestExample
items.description: Multi-language request sample panel for API endpoint docs.

items.name: response-example
items.title: ApiDocsResponseExample
items.description: Response payload panel (status variants) for API endpoint docs.

items.name: lifecycle-badge
items.title: ApiDocsLifecycleBadge
items.description: Lifecycle status badge (new/beta/active/maintenance/deprecated/sunset). Preset wrapper over core SemanticBadge; the lifecycle vocabulary + tone calibration ship in the preset.

items.name: method-badge
items.title: ApiDocsMethodBadge
items.description: HTTP method badge (GET/POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE) in mono type. Preset wrapper over core SemanticBadge; the method vocabulary + tone calibration ship in the preset.

items.name: enum-table
items.title: ApiDocsEnumTable
items.description: Allowed-values table for a field: flat list or condition-grouped variants, with filter + scroll for long lists. Enum display types travel inline with the component.

items.name: field-group
items.title: ApiDocsFieldGroup
items.description: Semantically-labelled group heading for a set of field rows (e.g. HEADERS, REQUEST BODY), with an optional count. No dependencies.

items.name: field-item
items.title: ApiDocsFieldItem
items.description: Recursive field row for an endpoint's schema: name/type/requiredness summary, secondary metadata band (condition, allowed values, constraints, example, lifecycle), and collapsible subfields. The field data model (FieldNode, EnumValue, EnumVariant, FieldNote, …) travels inline with the component. Deep linking ships as the useFieldAnchor composable; consumers call initFromHash() on mount (an optional router.options hash tweak only removes a cold-load scroll flash).

items.name: sidebar-nav
items.title: ApiDocsSidebarNav
items.description: Documentation sidebar mixing collapsible guide sections and purpose-named endpoint sections (leading HTTP method badge + trailing width-adaptive scenario tags). Grouped bands and typography-only section headers keep the two worlds distinct; a top '/' search filters by label, method, and scenario; the nav is drag/keyboard-resizable with the width persisted to localStorage. Full design rationale lives in sidebar-nav.md.
